playbook.intent: Bridge the canyon between 'leadership wants AI' and 'team commits roadmap slot'. PM proves or kills an AI feature on user value (not model novelty) before it touches the roadmap. Faion has agentic-ai-product-development at geek tier but no de-risking playbook for AI feature commits specifically.
playbook.scope: Bridge the canyon between 'leadership wants AI' and 'team commits roadmap slot'. PM proves or kills an AI feature on user value (not model novelty) before it touches the roadmap. Faion has agentic-ai-product-development at geek tier but no de-risking playbook for AI feature commits specifically.

success-criteria.criterion: De-noveltied feature statement with non-AI counterfactual

stage.name: De-novelty
stage.intent: Strip the model novelty and look at user value.

tasks.task: Restate the feature as a JTBD the user already has
Test if a non-AI solution would also serve the JTBD
Note the genuine reason the agent must be involved

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the feature has a non-AI counterfactual that loses against the AI version on a real reason.

stage.name: Wizard-of-Oz test
stage.intent: Fake the agent with a human in the loop.

tasks.task: Mock the agent response with a human responder
Run 5+ user sessions with the WoZ setup
Watch user reactions to imperfect-but-fast vs slow-but-perfect responses

stage.decision-gate: Advance when WoZ shows clear value, not curiosity-only engagement.

stage.name: Eval-first sketch
stage.intent: Sketch the eval set before any model work.

tasks.task: Confirm eval is achievable with the candidate model

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 20+ scenarios are documented and reviewable.

stage.name: Risk + trust read
stage.intent: Map the failure surface and the user trust requirement.

tasks.task: Decide if the feature can ship behind a 'tentative answer' frame

stage.decision-gate: Advance when failure modes have an explicit acceptable-trust threshold.

stage.name: De-risk vote
stage.intent: Convert evidence into a roadmap-commit decision.

tasks.task: Score the feature on user value, eval feasibility, and trust requirement
Document the rationale for any commit decision

outputs.output: Commit / hold / kill decision with rationale

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written de-risk verdict; no 'let's see' allowed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content validate-an-ai-feature-before-it-consumes-a-quarter --format md, agent: faion get-content validate-an-ai-feature-before-it-consumes-a-quarter --format context, json: faion get-content validate-an-ai-feature-before-it-consumes-a-quarter --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
